{"summary": "Analyzed the Pocket Cinema app and recorded TV portability.", "files": {"out/ANALYSIS.md": "# Pocket Cinema — App Analysis

## Screens
- Single screen in `src/App.tsx`: a `SafeAreaView` with a brand label and a placeholder message.

## Components
- No reusable components yet. Rendering is inline in `App.tsx`.

## Data
- `src/catalog.ts` defines the `Show` type and an empty/placeholder catalog.

## Portable to TV
- Shared React Native primitives (`SafeAreaView`, `Text`, `StyleSheet`) and the data module port directly.

## Needs TV-specific work
- No navigation, no remote focus handling, no Select/Back flow. These must be added for a 10-foot UI.
"}}

{"summary": "Repaired the plan using the verification failure; added the remote control flow.", "files": {"out/TV_PORT_PLAN.md": "# Pocket Cinema — TV Port Plan

## TV Screen Layout
- A horizontal rail of show cards with a featured header. Large type and spacing for a 10-foot UI.

## Remote Control
- Launch: focus starts on the first card.
- Left / Right: move focus along the rail, stopping at the boundaries.
- Select (OK): open the details for the focused card.
- Back: return to the rail and restore focus to the originating card.

## Gaps
- Confirm the exact TV focus API on the target platform before coding.
"}}
